metadata.title: FixAllRequest — body of POST /fix/all and POST /fix/modularity

description: Request body shared by the flow-dispatch endpoints POST /v1/fix/all and POST /v1/fix/modularity (src/api/v1/fix_routes.py, class RunFlowRequest). The issue names this FixAllRequest; the live class RunFlowRequest backs both endpoints, so the contract governs the actual symbol. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 D7 (#454).

write.description: Dry-run safety flag (ADR-014). Defaults to false; true persists the run.

requested_by.description: Attribution recorded on the core.fix_runs row. Defaults to 'api'.
